parameters.name: search_videos
parameters.description: Search YouTube for videos. QUOTA WARNING: costs 100 units per call (100 calls/day on free tier). Parameters: query (required), limit (default 5, max 25), order (relevance|date|viewCount|rating, default relevance).

parameters.name: get_video
parameters.description: Get video details: stats (views, likes, comments), duration, tags, full description. Only costs 1 quota unit. Parameters: video_id (required, e.g. vcvRVlc_VFg — the v= part of a YouTube URL).

value.video_id: ={{ $fromAI('video_id', 'YouTube video ID (the v= part of the URL)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_channel
parameters.description: Get YouTube channel profile and stats (subs, views, video count). Parameters: channel_id (UC...) OR handle (@username). One is required.

value.channel_id: ={{ $fromAI('channel_id', 'Channel ID starting with UC (alternative to handle)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: list_channel_videos
parameters.description: List most recent uploads from a specific YouTube channel. Parameters: channel_id (UC...) OR handle (@username) — one required; limit (default 5, max 20).

value.channel_id: ={{ $fromAI('channel_id', 'Channel ID starting with UC (alternative to handle)', 'string') }}
